import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut is_pal = true
  mut i = 0

  while i < n / 2
    let left = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      b
    when None
      -1
    end

    let right = match string.byte_at(line, n - 1 - i)
    when Some(b)
      b
    when None
      -1
    end

    if left != right
      is_pal = false
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if is_pal
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end

  Ok(())
end
